nasb.text: So I have told you today, but you have not obeyed the Lord your God, even in whatever He has sent me to tell you.

esv.text: And I have this day declared it to you, but you have not obeyed the voice of the Lord your God in anything that he sent me to tell you.

cnv.text: 我今天告訴了你們，你們卻不聽從耶和華你們的　神派我來告訴你們的一切話。

ccb.text: 今日，我把你们上帝耶和华的话告诉了你们，你们却不听从。
